name: relayforge
description: Zero-dependency local-first AI coding gateway with combo routing, fallback, privacy logs, and OpenAI/Anthropic compatibility.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: node scripts/test-format-convert.mjs && node scripts/test-balance.mjs && node scripts/test-secret-store.mjs && node scripts/test-auth.mjs && node scripts/test-config-root.mjs && node scripts/test-runtime-root.mjs && node scripts/test-runtime-state-queue.mjs && node scripts/test-i18n.mjs && node scripts/test-token-estimate.mjs && node scripts/test-config-schema.mjs && node scripts/test-error-category.mjs && node scripts/test-route-preview.mjs && node scripts/test-dashboard-html.mjs && node scripts/test-doctor-redaction.mjs && node scripts/test-check-readonly.mjs && node scripts/test-build-dist-clean.mjs && node scripts/test-release-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-test-cli.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-template-parity.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-template-import-plan.mjs && node scripts/test-ide-proxy-preview.mjs && node scripts/test-ide-proxy-runtime.mjs && node scripts/test-ide-proxy-port-check.mjs && node scripts/test-ide-proxy-start-plan.mjs && node scripts/test-local-connector-plan.mjs && node scripts/test-local-connector-availability.mjs && node scripts/test-local-connector-provider-preview.mjs && node scripts/test-local-connector-consent-manifest.mjs && node scripts/test-local-connector-consent-approval.mjs && node scripts/test-combo.mjs && node scripts/test-privacy.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-registry-lib.mjs && node scripts/test-request-log.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/test-stream-bridge.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-health.mjs && node scripts/test-responses-stream.mjs && node scripts/test-auth-required.mjs && node scripts/test-usage-recording.mjs && node scripts/test-codex-compat.mjs && node scripts/test-testchain-cleanup.mjs && node scripts/test-spa-refresh-route.mjs && node scripts/test-dashboard-http.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-direct-route.mjs && node scripts/test-model-alias.mjs && node scripts/test-sk-or-routing.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-fallback.mjs && node scripts/test-quota-aware-fallback.mjs && node scripts/test-upstream-model-map.mjs && node --test-force-exit scripts/test-dotenv-last-wins.mjs && node --test-force-exit scripts/test-soft-refresh-fallback.mjs && node --test-force-exit scripts/test-user-flow.mjs && node scripts/test-build-dist-staging.mjs && node scripts/test-release-zip-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:routing: node scripts/test-provider-direct-route.mjs && node scripts/test-model-alias.mjs && node scripts/test-sk-or-routing.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-fallback.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:admin: node scripts/test-auth-required.mjs && node scripts/test-usage-recording.mjs && node scripts/test-spa-refresh-route.mjs && node scripts/test-dashboard-http.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:compat: node scripts/test-codex-compat.mjs && node scripts/test-dotenv-last-wins.mjs && node scripts/test-soft-refresh-fallback.mjs && node scripts/test-user-flow.mjs
scripts.test:release: npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:dashboard-ui && npm run test:combo-e2e && npm run test:crash && npm run test:e2e:core && npm run test:e2e:routing && npm run test:e2e:quota && npm run test:e2e:admin && npm run build-dist
scripts.test:runner: node --test scripts/test-format-convert.mjs scripts/test-balance.mjs scripts/test-secret-store.mjs scripts/test-auth.mjs scripts/test-config-root.mjs scripts/test-runtime-root.mjs scripts/test-runtime-state-queue.mjs scripts/test-i18n.mjs scripts/test-token-estimate.mjs scripts/test-config-schema.mjs scripts/test-error-category.mjs scripts/test-route-preview.mjs scripts/test-doctor-redaction.mjs scripts/test-check-readonly.mjs scripts/test-build-dist-clean.mjs scripts/test-release-artifacts.mjs scripts/test-provider-test-cli.mjs scripts/test-dotenv-last-wins.mjs scripts/test-soft-refresh-fallback.mjs
scripts.test:coverage: node --experimental-test-coverage --test scripts/test-format-convert.mjs scripts/test-balance.mjs scripts/test-secret-store.mjs scripts/test-auth.mjs scripts/test-config-root.mjs scripts/test-runtime-root.mjs scripts/test-runtime-state-queue.mjs scripts/test-i18n.mjs scripts/test-token-estimate.mjs scripts/test-config-schema.mjs scripts/test-error-category.mjs scripts/test-route-preview.mjs scripts/test-doctor-redaction.mjs scripts/test-check-readonly.mjs scripts/test-build-dist-clean.mjs scripts/test-release-artifacts.mjs scripts/test-provider-test-cli.mjs scripts/test-dotenv-last-wins.mjs scripts/test-soft-refresh-fallback.mjs
